content: API keys never enter the sandbox. Stored on host, injected by L7 proxy at network layer. Deny-by-default network policy. All outbound blocked unless explicitly allowed by policy YAML.

name: System vs user network policies
description: Baseline policies locked in UI (no revoke). Only user-approved draft policies revocable. SYSTEM_RULES set in active-policy-panel.tsx.

name: username-password-auth
description: Auth pattern: replaced token-based auth with username/password + bcrypt (12 rounds). isSetupRequired() checks credentials.json for admin_username/admin_password_hash. In-memory sessions Map holds session tokens set as httpOnly cookies. First-visit detected via GET /api/auth/status returning setupRequired:true.

title: Username/password auth replaces token auth
rationale: Token auth required SSH access to read server-generated token, unusable for non-technical users
